title: Siemens U273 orchestrated parametric netlist
scientific_boundary: The current executable DC netlist keeps the B11/S6/S7 command path as a finite Thevenin reference. Full active B11+B6 closure waits for unread transistor routes and complete B11 netlist proof.

b6.adjustmentModel: R7/R8 are effective two-terminal resistances unless alpha7/alpha8 is explicitly supplied as a rheostat simplification.

components.function: finite command source replacing old ideal VCMD
Thevenin output resistance of not-yet-closed active B11/S6/S7 path
bridge input coupling; corrected from provisional 1000p to schematic 0.68u
bridge balance, effective value used in MNA
bridge balance/command trim, effective value used in MNA
front signal transistor; not nonlinear-stamped by default
front signal transistor; hybrid-pi candidate only
middle gain/driver transistor; not nonlinear-stamped by default
middle gain/driver transistor; hybrid-pi candidate only
upper output transistor; output-stage bound only
lower output transistor; output-stage bound only

B6.title: Siemens U273 B6 complete schematic inventory
B6.boundary: All visible B6 service-sheet components are inventoried. Active BJT nonlinear stamps remain guarded; bridge DC/AC execution uses the closed diode/passive subset.

node_aliases.CMD: B11/S7 command injection node via R10

components.function: bridge input coupling; corrected from provisional 1000p to schematic 0.68u

unresolved: All non-delivery Vorentzerrung positions still require contact-table proof.
R1/R2 routing by every S6 position is still bounded, not final.

contact_hypotheses.name: core_all_branches
contact_hypotheses.note: Current provisional S6 core: LM, MR, LR and VM-to-ground RC branch active.

contact_hypotheses.name: core_without_lr_bridge
contact_hypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: LR bridge R5/C3 open.

contact_hypotheses.name: core_without_m0_shunt
contact_hypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: VM-to-ground R6/C4 branch open.

contact_hypotheses.name: core_series_lm_mr_only
contact_hypotheses.note: Sensitivity case: only LM and MR paths active.

contact_table.note: User-confirmed drawing state: S7 common node 17 is switched to 18. D1 ZL10 remains in the limiter detector path.
Opposite switch state inferred for compressor mode: S7 common node 17 is switched to 19, bypassing the ZL10 contribution.

detector_scenarios.name: limiter_low_drop
detector_scenarios.note: Limiter bound with ZL10 active and low diode/rectifier drops.

detector_scenarios.name: limiter_nominal
detector_scenarios.note: Nominal limiter hypothesis: ZL10 active, SSD55 plus rectifier drops chosen around the printed 8 V RMS threshold.

detector_scenarios.name: limiter_high_drop
detector_scenarios.note: Limiter bound with ZL10 active and high diode/rectifier drops.

detector_scenarios.name: limiter_zener_minus10pct
detector_scenarios.note: Sensitivity bound: ZL10 effective voltage 10 percent lower, nominal diode/rectifier drops.

detector_scenarios.name: limiter_zener_plus10pct
detector_scenarios.note: Sensitivity bound: ZL10 effective voltage 10 percent higher, nominal diode/rectifier drops.

detector_scenarios.name: compressor_partial_zener_bound
detector_scenarios.note: Conservative bound kept for sensitivity: S7 effectively leaves half of the ZL10 threshold in the path.

detector_scenarios.name: compressor_s7_17_to_19_zener_bypassed
detector_scenarios.note: Compressor hypothesis tied to the opposite S7 state: 17-19 bypasses the ZL10 contribution.

B6_bridge.warning: Law is closed; final bridge polarity remains photo-dependent.

B6.rule: Expose BJT candidates and bounds; do not stamp them unless an explicit conditional hypothesis selects proven terminals.

bjt_candidates.sourceEvidence: N38=3.8 V, N32=3.2 V gives VBE=0.6 V; R22 current is coherent with a small transistor stage.
bjt_candidates.notStampedReason: Pinout/topology is not photo-proven. AC stamp is allowed only under an explicit named hypothesis.

hybrid_pi_candidates.currentBasis: IE ~= I_R22 = N32/R22 = 390 uA, if N32 is Ts2 emitter.
hybrid_pi_candidates.evidence: N38=3.8 V, N32=3.2 V gives VBE=0.6 V; R22 current is coherent with a small transistor stage.
hybrid_pi_candidates.limit: Collector node N64_T2 and interaction with Ts3 still require route confirmation before full nonlinear MNA.

hybrid_pi_candidates.limit: Ts3/Ts4 coupling and R28/R29/C17 route still need confirmation before large-signal transistor closure.

symbolic_boundaries.reason: Ts2 has a plausible VBE/current candidate, but Ts1 terminal routing is not closed. N08 needs active injection, not a passive resistor patch.
Ts4 has a coherent VBE/VCE candidate. Ts3 and feedback/compensation routes must stay symbolic until routing is proven.
The output point is physically coherent but not enough to choose a unique small-signal topology.

B11.note: Ts1/Ts2 hypotheses remain delegated to b11_ts1_ts2_pin_hypothesis_solver.js until photo proof.

netlist.title: Siemens U273 B6 parametric bridge DC netlist
notes: Local B6 operating point driven by a finite B11/S6/S7 Thevenin command source.
C1 is corrected to the complete B6 schematic value 0.68 uF; it does not enter this DC solve.
C4/C6 are adjustment capacitors and are open for DC.
Bridge diodes use the Siemens empirical U_D/I_D/r_d law from the U273 notes.
netlist.commandDcModel: B11/S6/S7 Thevenin source 1 V through 10000 Ohm

parameters.adjustmentModel: R7/R8 are effective two-terminal resistances unless alpha7/alpha8 is explicitly supplied as a rheostat simplification.

diodes.name: D3_SSD55
diodes.empiricalLawNote: Siemens U273 measured bridge diode power law; applied to each D1-D4 schematic diode element.

diodes.name: D4_OA154Q
diodes.empiricalLawNote: Siemens U273 measured bridge diode power law; applied to each D1-D4 schematic diode element.

diodes.name: D2_SSD55
diodes.empiricalLawNote: Siemens U273 measured bridge diode power law; applied to each D1-D4 schematic diode element.

diodes.name: D1_OA154Q
diodes.empiricalLawNote: Siemens U273 measured bridge diode power law; applied to each D1-D4 schematic diode element.
